# genedai.md

> Gene Dai — Product builder, Co-Founder & CPO of Metix AI. Building autonomous AI recruiters; previously led products at BOSS Zhipin, Liepin, Zuoyebang, and Zhidemai Tech.

Based in California. Studied Computer Software Engineering at Beihang University. Areas of expertise: AI recruiting, product management, user growth, platform products, HRTech.

## Profile

- [Personal homepage](https://genedai.md/): Hub for projects, writing, and contact.
- [Blog](https://genedai.me): Long-form writing on AI, HRTech, and product strategy.
- [Medium](https://genedai.medium.com): English articles on AI leaders, HRTech, and recruiting.
- [Substack](https://genedai.substack.com): Newsletter on autonomous AI agents and the future of hiring.

## Projects

- [Mira — AI Recruiter](https://metix.ai): End-to-end autonomous AI recruiter from Metix AI. Sourcing, screening, outreach, scheduling. Reached #1 on Product Hunt.
- [Raltic](https://raltic.com): Team chat where AI agents (Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, Hermes) are first-class teammates. Code stays local; only chat crosses the wire.
- [VentureDex](https://venturedex.co): A thoughtful gallery of 70 outstanding early-stage companies, curated with editorial commentary.
- [OpenJobs Board](https://openjobs.genedai.me): Free, open-source job aggregator. 574+ positions across 422+ companies, refreshed every six hours.
- [HireAI Directory](https://hireai.genedai.me): 149+ HR AI products organized by five technology eras, with 50+ browseable tags.
- [Website2Markdown](https://md.genedai.me): URL-to-Markdown converter on Cloudflare Workers with 21 platform adapters and a 5-layer fallback chain.
- [GeneDai CV](https://genedai.cv): AI-powered resume builder with 28+ professional templates.
- [Recruit Navigator](https://recruit.genedai.me): Recruitment tools directory inspired by OSINT-framework. 300+ categories, 1,900+ resources.

## Career

- Co-Founder, Metix AI (2024–present): Autonomous AI recruiting platform.
- Head of Product Management, Zuoyebang: China's largest K12 online education platform.
- Head of Product, Liepin (6100.HK): Executive recruitment platform.
- Product Director, Zhidemai Tech (300785.SZ): Consumer content & commerce platform.
- Head of Product / Head of Product of Kanzhun.com, BOSS Zhipin (BZ/2076.HK): China's leading mobile recruiting platform.
- Senior Product Manager, Dora Tech: Sequoia Capital China backed.
- Co-founder & Chief Product Officer, Feel: Health & fitness app, ZhenFund backed.
